answer.en: YAML Formatter parses your YAML and re-serializes it with consistent indentation, normalized quoting, and clean structure.
YAML comments are not preserved during format-and-reserialize operations because the standard YAML data model does not include comments.
YAML uses 2 spaces for indentation by convention, though any consistent number of spaces is valid. Tabs are not allowed.
No. YAML must be syntactically valid to be formatted. Use the YAML Validator to identify errors first.

description.en: All processing runs locally in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.
Get results immediately — no waiting for server processing.
Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile browsers with no installation required.
No subscription, no limits, no hidden costs. Free forever.
